title: UACC-UF-WDM-XGS, UISP Fiber Coexistence WDM Filter
description: The wavelength division multiplexing module combines XGS/XG-PON and GPON services into one optical fiber distribution system. The module features 24 ports: 8 XGS/XG-PON ports, 8 GPON ports, and 8 ports towards clients GPON_ 1290-1330nm and 1480-1500nm XGS/XG-PON 1260-1280nm and 1575-1580nm Device 1U rack mounting kit
specsSearch: Optics Fiber type Single Mode Polishing type UPC
